Oracle Events
- Search Linear issues using linear_list_issues (query: "Mehta" or "Canopy") to find three relocation tracking issues: #343 Temporary Housing — Dr. Anand Mehta — Chicago River North (linear_issue_bd446671ceed, due 2026-05-01), #375 Equipment Packing & Chain-of-Custody — Dr. Mehta — Medical Research Equipment (linear_issue_8fe3ff7f9f9a, due 2026-04-30), and #396 Household Move — Dr. Anand Mehta — Boston to Chicago (linear_issue_4902f5c68acb, due 2026-05-03). All three are assigned to Fatimah Al-Rashidi, state in_progress, priority 1.
- Read comments on Linear issues using linear_list_comments (issueId: linear_issue_8fe3ff7f9f9a) to discover the detailed equipment inventory in linear_comment_af330662c322: two Eizo RadiForce RX660 monitors (S/N RX660-1147A, RX660-1203A), SentrySafe DH-109E filing cabinet (~350 lbs, chain-of-custody required), Herman Miller Aeron chair, and Uplift V2 sit-stand desk. Also discover the BLOCKER: chain-of-custody documentation template needed from Canopy Health compliance team (Patricia Langford). Also read comments on linear_issue_bd446671ceed to find linear_comment_f5b272d2d598 with UrbanNest's three housing options and the April 25 deadline for Dr. Mehta to select.
- Search emails in Fatimah's inbox using search_emails (query: "Mehta" or "Carmen Reyes" or "housing" or similar) to find: (1) Carmen Reyes' housing options email (email_email_2a9a1d2f91b6) with three options — Option A River North $1,250/wk, Option B Streeterville/The Pinnacle $1,350/wk, Option C Gold Coast $1,450/wk; (2) Dr. Anand Mehta's confirmation email (email_email_mehta_housing_confirmation) selecting Option B (The Pinnacle, 400 E Ohio St, Unit 3415, Streeterville) and removing the Herman Miller Aeron chair from the move inventory ("NO Aeron chair"); (3) Dr. Mehta's earlier equipment inventory email (email_email_0200abd22d2a) where his Boston address is listed as "None" — confirming the pickup address is still missing. The agent should also discover that no email from Patricia Langford with the chain-of-custody documentation template exists in the inbox, confirming it is still pending.
- Look up contact email addresses using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Patricia Langford"), contacts_search_contacts (query: "Mehta"), and contacts_search_contacts (query: "Carmen Reyes") to retrieve patricia.langford@canopyhealth.io, anand.mehta@canopyhealth.io, and carmen.reyes@urbannestsolutions.com for sending the required emails.
- Send an email using send_email (sender: fatimah.al-rashidi@moveops.com, recipients: [patricia.langford@canopyhealth.io], subject containing "Urgent", content requesting the chain-of-custody documentation template for the SentrySafe DH-109E filing cabinet for Dr. Mehta's relocation).
- Send an email using send_email (sender: fatimah.al-rashidi@moveops.com, recipients: [anand.mehta@canopyhealth.io], subject containing "Urgent", content requesting Dr. Mehta's Boston pickup address for scheduling the pack date with Swift Relocations).
- Send an email using send_email (sender: fatimah.al-rashidi@moveops.com, recipients: [carmen.reyes@urbannestsolutions.com], content confirming housing Option B — The Pinnacle, 400 E Ohio St, Streeterville — per Dr. Mehta's selection, and requesting the lease agreement to lock in the booking).
- Add a comment to linear_issue_8fe3ff7f9f9a using linear_create_comment (issueId: linear_issue_8fe3ff7f9f9a, body noting that Dr. Mehta confirmed the Herman Miller Aeron chair is no longer needed for the move per his email, and the updated equipment inventory no longer includes it).
- Post a message to the #operations Slack channel using conversations_add_message (channel_id for #operations, payload summarizing: (1) an urgent email was sent to Patricia Langford requesting the chain-of-custody documentation template, (2) an urgent email was sent to Dr. Anand Mehta requesting his Boston pickup address, (3) a confirmation email for The Pinnacle, 400 E Ohio St, Streeterville was sent to Carmen Reyes, and (4) a comment was added to linear_issue_8fe3ff7f9f9a noting the Aeron chair removal from the equipment inventory).
- Search Airtable records using airtable_search_records (base_id: appMoveOpsOps001, table_name: Relocations, field_name: Name, value: "Dr. Anand Mehta") or airtable_list_records (base_id: appMoveOpsOps001, table_name: Relocations) to check whether a relocation record already exists. The agent should discover that a record already exists (rec1299092c9a4541) with Name: Dr. Anand Mehta, Company: Canopy Health, Status: In Progress, Origin: Boston, MA, Destination: Chicago, IL, and does not need to be created.
- Search the user's calendar using calendar_search_events (query: "Mehta") or calendar_get_calendar_events_from_to (start_datetime: 2026-04-30, end_datetime: 2026-05-04) to check whether calendar events already exist for the three Linear issue due dates (2026-04-30, 2026-05-01, 2026-05-03).
- Create three calendar events using calendar_add_calendar_event for each Linear issue due date: (1) Equipment Packing & Chain-of-Custody due date at 2026-04-30 23:59, (2) Temporary Housing due date at 2026-05-01 23:59, and (3) Household Move due date at 2026-05-03 23:59.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

# Criterion Run #1Run #2Run #3Run #4Run #5Run #6 Pass Rate
1 The model must send an email to \`anand.mehta@canopyhealth.io\` stating that the Boston address is needed with "Urgent" in the subject line
outcome

✓Run #1The agent sent an email to anand.mehta@canopyhealth.io with subject 'Urgent — Boston Pickup Address Needed for Your Relocation', which contains 'Urgent' and requests the Boston pickup address.
✓Run #2The agent sent an email via send_email to ['anand.mehta@canopyhealth.io'] with subject 'Urgent — Boston Pickup Address Needed for Your Relocation'. The subject contains 'Urgent' and the body requests the Boston pickup address.

✗Run #4The agent used reply_to_email (not send_email) to contact Dr. Mehta. The reply was to email_email_mehta_housing_confirmation, which means the subject would be 'Re: [original subject]'. There is no indication in the trajectory that 'Urgent' was added to the subject line of this reply. The criterion requires 'Urgent' in the subject line.
✓Run #5The agent called send_email with recipients ['anand.mehta@canopyhealth.io'] and subject 'Urgent — Boston Pickup Address Needed for Your Relocation', which contains 'Urgent' and requests the Boston pickup address.
✓Run #6The agent sent an email to anand.mehta@canopyhealth.io with subject 'Urgent — Boston Pickup Address Needed for Packing Coordination', which contains 'Urgent' in the subject line and requests the Boston address.
